DEV BUILD - calculations under verification, do not screenshot or share externally
Welcome to Cosmic Daily Planner

Before you start, three things to know.

Cosmic Daily Planner is a place where ancient frameworks and modern neuroscience meet to show you the texture of your day. It is a wellness and self-knowledge companion, not a medical product, a therapist, or a doctor. It does not diagnose, treat, prevent, or cure any condition.

Your readings are written by an AI system, not a human practitioner. The AI draws on frameworks (numerology, astrology, the lunar cycle, the Dreamspell calendar) and on cognitive neuroscience research. We tell you what each reading is based on, and we cite the sources where helpful.

If you are experiencing a mental health crisis, or if you are concerned about your wellbeing or someone else's, please reach out to a qualified professional. We will signpost relevant resources whenever a reading touches difficult territory; you can also tap the support button at any time to see them.

What does "wellness companion" mean here?

It means CDP gives you frameworks to think with about your day, your relationships, and your patterns. The frameworks come from traditions humans have used for two and a half thousand years (numerology, astrology, the lunar cycle, the Dreamspell calendar) and from neuroscience research from the last fifty (predictive processing, interoception, circadian cognition, attachment). We pair them so you can choose the language you want to think in.

What it is not

It is not a substitute for therapy, medical care, or professional advice. If something in your life is serious, please see someone qualified to help with it. We will tell you when a reading touches territory where professional support is appropriate, and we'll show you where to find it.

Privacy

Your readings, profile, and any documents you upload are stored privately and are never used to train AI models. You can delete your data at any time from your profile settings.

The AI behind your readings

We use Anthropic's Claude as the underlying language model. Every reading is generated freshly for you based on your birth data, today's date, the lunar phase, and the framework synthesis we have built. The references we cite are real and traceable.

One more thing

CDP is for adults.

To continue, please confirm you are 18 years old or older. CDP is designed for adults, and the framework readings can touch emotional territory that requires the agency and context of an adult.

Thank you for being honest. CDP is designed for adults. If you are under 18 and looking for support, here are resources for younger people:

UK: Childline, free 24/7. Call 0800 1111 or chat at childline.org.uk.
US: Teen Line. Call 1-800-852-8336 or text TEEN to 839863.
Other regions: The IASP keeps a global directory at iasp.info/resources/Crisis_Centres.

You are welcome to come back when you are 18.

Privacy Policy
☽ CDP GUIDE ⬡

Two telescopes. Pointed at the same sky.

Cosmic Daily Planner is a place where ancient frameworks and modern neuroscience meet. Pythagorean numerology, Western astrology, Mayan calendrics, lunar cycles, sitting alongside circadian cognition, predictive processing, attachment, default mode network research. They arrive at the same coordinates. CDP shows you both, in the language you prefer.

1. THE MORNING COMPASS

Your daily 30-second check-in, before any full reading. Three tiles at the top of your day:

◊ Kin today's Dreamspell signature, with the ★ if it's a Galactic Activation Portal
☽ Moon today's lunar phase, with Black Moon and Shiva Moon flags when applicable
Personal Day your specific number for today, calculated from your birth date

Tap any tile to open a quick Oracle drawer with insight in your current voice. Each drawer offers three follow-up chips, including a cross-voice nudge so you can see the same insight through another lens.

Below the tiles is a single intention input. Type a focus for today, even one phrase. Tomorrow, your reading will reference it.

2. THREE VOICES

Every reading section is written in three voices. Toggle between them at the top of any reading.

☽ TRADITION
Symbolic and archetypal. The language of millennia of human reflection. Numerology, archetypal astrology (Greene, Tarnas), Maya calendrics, lunar wisdom.
⬡ SCIENCE
Mechanistic and causal. Circadian cognition (Cajochen), default mode network (Raichle), interoception (Barrett), predictive processing (Clark), attachment (Bowlby), hippocampal consolidation (Walker).
◇ EVERYDAY
Plain-spoken. No jargon from either tradition or science. The language of a smart friend who happens to know what your day is asking for.

Below each section, you will see chips: More: Tradition ↗, More: Science ↗, More: Everyday ↗. Tap one to reveal that voice for that section, inline. Multiple voices can be open at once. This is the magazine model: see the same insight through different lenses without losing your place.

3. THE TABS
Reading your full daily Oracle across all four frameworks, in three voices
Daily Card a single shareable card with today's synthesis
Calendar monthly view with Kin, moon phases, GAP portals, master numbers, Black/Shiva moons. Tap any day to preview, or open a reading for it. The Best Day finder lives at the top.
My Energy your personal numerology, Life Path, Personal Year, Birth Kin, Chinese astrology profile
Compatibility enter a second person's birth data for a relationship reading across all frameworks
Profile save your birth details, time, location, and personal context. The Oracle becomes more specific the more you tell it.
History your past readings, tap any to reopen
4. READING DEPTHS
✦ Free Universal Day, moon phase, Kin. Instant.
⚡ Seeker all four frameworks, priorities, shadow work, week ahead. Roughly 15 seconds.
☽ Initiate Seeker plus monthly arc, lunation map, wavespell sequence. 2-4 minutes.
◉ Mystic natal chart integration, yearly arc, transit themes. 3-5 minutes.
◈ Oracle maximum depth, all frameworks, Hellenistic lots, biorhythms, hormonal phase. 5-10 minutes.
5. SPECIAL DAYS
★ GAP Portal Galactic Activation Portal. The Dreamspell tradition holds these as days when synchronicities amplify. 52 such Kins per 260-day cycle.
⚠ Black Moon two days before the new moon. A liminal threshold. Symbolically, do not initiate. Complete and release. Useful for closing loops.
✨ Shiva Moon two days after the new moon. Generative and fertile. Auspicious for new actions, new conversations, fresh starts.
11, 22, 33, 44 master number days. Heightened frequency. Tap the day in Calendar to read its specific meaning.
9-day completion energy. Good for finishing rather than starting.
7-day contemplative, introspective. Slow down and reflect.
6. MEMORY AND CONTINUITY

CDP is built so it remembers. The Oracle is not a daily slot machine; today's reading is in conversation with yesterday and the day before.

Yesterday's thread: when you write an intention into the Compass, tomorrow's reading references it. The "Yesterday's thread" panel appears at the top of the reading. The Oracle picks up where you left off.

When signed in, your intentions are saved to a private database scoped only to you. They survive across devices and sessions. Anonymous use keeps your data session-only.

7. PROFILES

The Profiles button (☿) in the topbar lets you save multiple people, family, friends, colleagues. Switch active profile before generating a reading to receive it for that person. Use Compatibility to read two profiles together.

The more personal context you add (what you are building, who matters to you, what you are navigating), the more specific the Oracle becomes. It speaks to your actual life, not a generic one.

8. ASKING THE ORACLE

Tap any section heading or card in a reading to open a follow-up drawer. Pre-built chips suggest common questions, or type your own.

The Oracle answers in your current voice and references your full reading context. Ask about the shadow side of a Kin, how a transit interacts with your natal chart, what to do practically with a Personal Day energy.

9. PICK A DAY

Open the Calendar tab. Each day shows badges for Kin, moon phase, GAP portal, and master numbers. Tap any day to see its energy and open a full reading for it.

Best Day finder at the top of Calendar: tell it what you are planning (a difficult conversation, a launch, a long flight, a creative session), and it returns the most favourable day in the next month, with reasons specific to your numerology and the cosmic weather.

10. A SUGGESTED DAILY FLOW
Morning open the Compass. Tap a tile if anything calls. Type one line of intention. Then if you have time, generate a full reading.
Midday return to the reading you generated. Read the afternoon pacing section. Toggle to a different voice if the morning one feels stale.
Evening scroll to the reflection section. Close the day intentionally. The Oracle remembers what you wrote in the morning Compass.
11. SOURCES AND INTEGRITY

Astronomical positions: Swiss Ephemeris (Koch and Treindl, Astrodienst AG) and JPL Horizons (NASA).

Maya scholarship: Šprajc, Inomata and Aveni (2023, Science Advances); Aldana (2022). Dreamspell is always labelled as Argüelles 1987, a 20th-century system distinct from ancient K'iche' Maya tradition.

Western astrology: Tarnas (2006), Greene (1976), Hand (2002), Brennan (2017).

Numerology: Drayer (2002), Kahn (2001).

Neuroscience: Cajochen and Schmidt (2024), Raichle (2015), Smallwood et al (2021), Barrett and Hoemann (2018), Walker (2017), Clark (2016).

Every factual claim in CDP traces to a named authority. Symbolic claims are explicitly labelled as symbolic.

12. WHAT CDP IS AND IS NOT

It is a wellness and self-knowledge companion, integrating ancient frameworks with modern neuroscience to give you the texture of your day in the language you choose.

It is not a medical product, therapist, or doctor. Not a substitute for professional advice. If you are in crisis or need clinical support, please reach out to a qualified professional. UK: Samaritans 116 123 (free, 24/7) or NHS 111. US: 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline.

Support resources

Some of what you've shared sounds difficult.

We are a wellness companion, not a crisis service. Please reach out to people who can help right now.

If you are in the United Kingdom
Samaritans, free 24/7. Call 116 123 or email jo@samaritans.org
NHS 111, free 24/7 for urgent help. Call 111
Shout, free crisis text service. Text SHOUT to 85258
If you are in the United States
988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline. Call or text 988
Crisis Text Line. Text HOME to 741741
Other regions
The International Association for Suicide Prevention has a global directory of helplines: iasp.info/resources/Crisis_Centres
